docs.title: AvalonStudios Script Docs
docs.text:
Benvenuto nella documentazione ufficiale degli script FiveM di AvalonStudios.

Qui trovi la reference completa per tutti gli script: configurazione, export disponibili ed esempi di utilizzo.

docs.title: Script Disponibili
docs.text: Script Descrizione Export avalon_coltivation Sistema di coltivazione piante ✅ avalon_dustman Lavoro netturbino (singolo/gruppo) ❌ avalon_electrician Lavoro elettricista con minigiochi ❌ avalon_lumberjack Lavoro taglialegna con minigioco ❌ avalon_mining Lavoro minatore con minigioco ❌ avalon_mounts Creature cavalcabili (draghi, grifoni, pegasi...) ✅ avalon_party Sistema party MMORPG con HUD, barre vitali, dungeon ✅ avalon_robbery Sistema rapina negozi ❌ avalon_trash Ricerca oggetti nei bidoni ❌

docs.title: Dipendenze Comuni
docs.text:
Tutti gli script richiedono le seguenti risorse attive sul server:

  • ox_lib — Libreria base
  • ox_target — Sistema interazioni
  • ox_inventory — Gestione inventario
  • es_extended — Framework ESX

Suggerimento

Assicurati che tutte le dipendenze siano avviate prima degli script Avalon nell'server.cfg.

docs.title: Come usare gli Export
docs.text:
Gli export permettono ad altri script di richiamare funzioni di uno script Avalon senza dipendenze dirette nel codice.

ClientServer 
-- Sintassi base per chiamare un export client-side
exports['nome-resource']:NomeFunzione(parametro1, parametro2)

-- Sintassi base per chiamare un export server-side
exports['nome-resource']:NomeFunzione(parametro1, parametro2)

Importante

Gli export client si chiamano solo da script lato client. Gli export server si chiamano solo da script lato server.

Documentazione realizzata da AvalonStudios — GitHub

docs.title: AvalonStudios Script Docs
docs.text:
Welcome to the official FiveM script documentation for AvalonStudios.

Here you'll find the complete reference for all scripts: configuration, available exports, and usage examples.

docs.title: Available Scripts
docs.text: Script Description Exports avalon_coltivation Plant cultivation system ✅ avalon_dustman Garbage collector job (solo/group) ❌ avalon_electrician Electrician job with minigames ❌ avalon_lumberjack Lumberjack job with minigame ❌ avalon_mining Mining job with minigame ❌ avalon_mounts Rideable creatures (dragons, griffins, pegasi...) ✅ avalon_party MMORPG party system with HUD, vital bars, dungeons ✅ avalon_robbery Shop robbery system ❌ avalon_trash Trash searching system ❌

docs.title: Common Dependencies
docs.text:
All scripts require the following resources to be running:

  • ox_lib — Base library
  • ox_target — Interaction system
  • ox_inventory — Inventory management
  • es_extended — ESX Framework

Tip

Make sure all dependencies are started before Avalon scripts in your server.cfg.

docs.title: How to Use Exports
docs.text:
Exports allow other scripts to call functions from an Avalon script without direct code dependencies.

ClientServer 
-- Basic syntax to call a client-side export
exports['resource-name']:FunctionName(param1, param2)

-- Basic syntax to call a server-side export
exports['resource-name']:FunctionName(param1, param2)

Important

Client exports can only be called from client-side scripts. Server exports can only be called from server-side scripts.

Documentation by AvalonStudios — GitHub

docs.title: avalon_coltivation
docs.text:
Script for plant cultivation in FiveM. Allows players to plant, water, fertilize, and harvest various crops on valid terrain.

Version: 1.0 | Author: Mino | Database: ✅ MySQL

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: Resource Required ox_lib ✅ oxmysql ✅ ox_target ✅ ox_inventory ✅

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
1. Add the avalon_coltivation folder to your resources/ directory
  2. The SQL table is created automatically on start
  3. Add to server.cfg:
ensure avalon_coltivation

docs.title: General Settings
docs.text: Option Type Default Description CONFIG.MIN_PLANT_DISTANCE number 1.5 Minimum distance between two plants CONFIG.MIN_STAGE_TIME number 300000 Minimum time (ms) to advance a growth stage CONFIG.StressMax number 1000000 Maximum stress to be able to plant CONFIG.StressValue number 100 Stress added each time a plant is placed

docs.title: Placement
docs.text:
CONFIG.PLACEMENT = {
    rotateStep = 5.0,   -- degrees per rotation step
    maxDistance = 5.0   -- max distance to place a plant
}

docs.title: Growth Stages
docs.text:
CONFIG.STAGES = {
    { percent = 0,   name = 'seed'  },
    { percent = 33,  name = 'small' },
    { percent = 66,  name = 'grown' },
    { percent = 100, name = 'ready' }  -- ready to harvest
}

docs.title: Harvest
docs.text:
CONFIG.HARVEST = {
    tool          = 'shears', -- item required to harvest
    breakChance   = 0.2,      -- chance to break plant without tool (20%)
    toolBreakChance = 0.05,   -- chance to break using the tool (5%)
    skillBonus    = 0.1       -- success bonus with "coltivazione" skill (+10%)
}

docs.title: Plants
docs.text: Plant Seed Time Yield Water grain seme_grano 30 min 5x grano ✅ canapa seme_canapa 45 min 3x canapa ✅ coca seme_coca 60 min 2x coca ✅ fungus seme_fungo 20 min 4x funghi ❌ papavero seme_papavero 50 min 2x papavero ✅

docs.title: Tools
docs.text: Tool Item Time Multiplier Single Use Stages Watering Can watering_can -25% ❌ seed, small Fertilizer fertilizer -40% ✅ small, grown Grow Lamp grow_lamp -15% ✅ seed, small, grown

docs.title: Available Exports
docs.text:
Type: Client-Side

These exports are registered on the client side and must be called from client scripts.

Each export starts the planting process for the corresponding seed.

docs.title: seme_grano
docs.text:
Start placing a wheat seed.

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_grano()

docs.title: seme_canapa
docs.text:
Start placing a hemp seed.

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_canapa()

docs.title: seme_coca
docs.text:
Start placing a coca seed.

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_coca()

docs.title: seme_fungo
docs.text:
Start placing a mushroom seed.

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_fungo()

docs.title: seme_papavero
docs.text:
Start placing a poppy seed.

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_papavero()

docs.title: Usage Example
docs.text:
-- client/main.lua of your script

-- Plant from a command
RegisterCommand('plant_wheat', function()
    exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_grano()
end)

-- Plant from an ox_target zone
exports.ox_target:addBoxZone({
    coords = vector3(100.0, 200.0, 30.0),
    size   = vector3(2, 2, 2),
    options = {
        {
            label = 'Plant wheat',
            onSelect = function()
                exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_grano()
            end
        }
    }
})

docs.title: avalon_dustman

docs.title: avalon_mounts
docs.text:
Script for rideable creatures in FiveM. Players can summon, ride, and manage fantastical creatures (dragons, griffins, pegasi, horses, alpacas) via commands or inventory items.

Version: 1.0 | Author: Mino

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: Resource Required Notes ox_lib ✅ Notifications and utilities ox_inventory ❌ Only if CONFIG.items = true ox_fuel ❌ Auto-maintains fuel at max qbx_core ❌ QBox keys integration qbx_vehiclekeys ❌ QBox keys integration

docs.title: Basic Usage (Commands)
docs.text: When CONFIG.command = true, players can summon and dismiss creatures directly from chat — no items or extra scripts needed.

docs.title: Summon a creature
docs.text:
/mount <name> <variant>
Parameter Type Description name string Creature type (see table below) variant number Variant number (1, 2, 3...)

Examples:

/mount necrodragon 1
/mount griffon 2
/mount pegaso 1
/mount horse 3
/mount alpaca 1

docs.title: Dismiss the creature
docs.text:
/delMount

Removes the currently summoned creature from the world.

docs.title: In-Game Controls
docs.text:
Once a creature is summoned:

Action Default Key Config Mount / Dismount E CONFIG.keyMount = 51 Dismiss creature H CONFIG.keyDelete = 74 Toggle fly mode X CONFIG.keyFlymode = 73

Changing keys

Edit the numeric values in config.lua. Codes correspond to FiveM control codes.

docs.title: Available Creatures
docs.text: Creature Command Variants Can Fly Necrodragon /mount necrodragon 5 (1–5) ✅ Griffon /mount griffon 3 (1–3) ✅ Pegaso /mount pegaso 3 (1–3) ✅ Horse /mount horse 3 (1–3) ❌ Alpaca /mount alpaca 3 (1–3) ❌

docs.title: General Settings
docs.text: Option Type Default Description CONFIG.command boolean true Enable /mount and /delMount commands CONFIG.commandName string "mount" Summon command name CONFIG.delCommand string "delMount" Dismiss command name CONFIG.items boolean true Enable item-based spawning (requires ox_inventory) CONFIG.invincible boolean false Make creature invincible CONFIG.maxrangedespawn number 200.0 Distance before creature auto-despawns CONFIG.timeForSpawnAfterDeaths number 10000 Wait time (ms) to summon after dying

docs.title: Flight System
docs.text:
CONFIG.flyWithTime = false   -- false = unlimited flight
CONFIG.flyTimeMax  = 60000   -- ms of flight (only if flyWithTime = true)
CONFIG.flyCooldown = 60000   -- ms cooldown before flying again

docs.title: Max Speed
docs.text:
Internal multiplier — test and calibrate on your server.

CONFIG.MaxSpeed = {
    ["necrodragon"] = 100.0,
    ["griffon"]     = 50.0,
    ["pegaso"]      = 70.0,
    ["alpaca"]      = 50.0,
    ["horse"]       = 70.0,
}

docs.title: API — Client-Side
docs.text:
Returns the API object with all public functions.

local MountsAPI = exports['avalon_mounts']:API()

docs.title: Functions
docs.text: Function Description MountsAPI.spawn(name, color) Summon a creature MountsAPI.despawn() Dismiss the active creature MountsAPI.isSpawned() true if a creature is summoned MountsAPI.isOnMount() true if player is mounted MountsAPI.getVehicle() Returns the creature vehicle entity MountsAPI.getData(model) Config data for a specific creature MountsAPI.getAllData() Data for all creatures MountsAPI.getBlacklist(vehicle) Check if a vehicle is blacklisted MountsAPI.deleteEnt(ent) Delete a specific entity MountsAPI.playAnimation(prop, anim, dict, loop) Play animation on the creature MountsAPI.syncInvisible(ent, bool) Sync visibility across all clients MountsAPI.syncHair(ent, head) Sync head/hair variant

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
local MountsAPI = exports['avalon_mounts']:API()

-- Summon griffon variant 2
MountsAPI.spawn("griffon", 2)

-- Check if player is mounted
if MountsAPI.isOnMount() then
    print("Player is riding a creature")
end

-- Get creature position
local mount = MountsAPI.getVehicle()
if mount then
    local coords = GetEntityCoords(mount)
end

-- Dismiss
MountsAPI.despawn()

Format: creatureName_variantNumber

docs.title: avalon_party
docs.text:
MMORPG-style party system for FiveM. Create groups with real-time HUD, customizable vital bars, ready check, shared waypoint, automatic spectator mode, and a target marking system.

Version: 1.0.0 | Author: Avalon | Framework: ESX / QBCore / QBox / Standalone

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: Resource Required ox_lib ✅ ox_target ✅

docs.title: Commands
docs.text: Command Argument Description /partyinvite [player id] Invite a player to the party /partyaccept — Accept a pending invite /partydecline — Decline a pending invite /partyleave — Leave the party /partydisband — Disband the party (leader only) /partykick [player id] Kick a member (leader only) /partytransfer [player id] Transfer leadership (leader only) /partyready — Start a ready check (leader only) /partywp — Share current waypoint (leader only)

docs.title: Keybinds
docs.text: Key Action F5 Open party management menu F1 Accept incoming invite F2 Decline incoming invite F3 Confirm "Ready" (ready check) F4 Confirm "Not Ready" (ready check) TAB Cycle nearby targets (leader only)

docs.title: General
docs.text: Option Default Description Config.maxPartySize 6 Maximum members per party Config.inviteExpiry 30000 ms before an invite expires Config.offlineGracePeriod 120000 ms before removing a disconnected member Config.readyCheckTimeout 15000 Ready check duration in ms

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
Config.Features = {
    distance   = true,  -- show distance (meters) on member cards
    readyCheck = true,  -- ready check system
    waypoint   = true,  -- shared waypoint from leader
    spectator  = true,  -- auto-spectator on death
    targetMark = true,  -- target marking with symbols (leader only)
}

docs.title: Vital Bars
docs.text: ID Label Auto-updated Color health HP ✅ GTA natives Red stamina Stamina ✅ GTA natives Green mana Mana ❌ use SetMemberBar Blue shield Shield ❌ use SetMemberBar Grey rage Rage ❌ use SetMemberBar Orange

docs.title: Statuses
docs.text: ID Label Icon combat In Combat ⚔️ poisoned Poisoned ☠️ buffed Buffed ✨ dead Dead 💀 afk AFK 💤

docs.title: IsInParty(source) → boolean
docs.text:
Check if a player is currently in a party.

local inParty = exports['avalon_party']:IsInParty(source)

if inParty then
    TriggerClientEvent('zone:denied', source, "Can't enter solo zones while in a party")
end

docs.title: GetPartyMembers(source) → table | nil
docs.text:
Returns a list of server IDs for all members of the player's party.

local members = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyMembers(source)

if members then
    for _, memberId in ipairs(members) do
        -- give an item to every party member
        exports.ox_inventory:AddItem(memberId, 'health_potion', 1)
    end
end

docs.title: GetPartyLeader(source) → number | nil
docs.text:
Returns the server ID of the party leader.

local leader = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyLeader(source)

if leader == source then
    print("This player is the party leader")
end

docs.title: SetMemberBar(source, barId, value, maxValue) → boolean
docs.text:
Update a custom bar in the HUD for a specific player, visible to all party members in real time.

-- Update mana bar after casting a spell
RegisterNetEvent('magic:castSpell', function(manaCost)
    local src = source
    local newMana = math.max(0, GetPlayerMana(src) - manaCost)
    SetPlayerMana(src, newMana)

    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberBar(src, 'mana', newMana, 100)
end)

-- Update shield on damage
RegisterNetEvent('combat:takeDamage', function(damage)
    local src = source
    local newShield = math.max(0, GetPlayerShield(src) - damage)
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberBar(src, 'shield', newShield, 100)
end)

docs.title: SetMemberStatus(source, statusId, active) → boolean
docs.text:
Show or hide a status icon on a member's HUD card.

-- Show "In Combat" when player fires
AddEventHandler('weaponDamageEvent', function(source)
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'combat', true)
    SetTimeout(5000, function()
        exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'combat', false)
    end)
end)

-- Show "Poisoned"
RegisterNetEvent('poison:apply', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', true)
end)
RegisterNetEvent('poison:cure', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', false)
end)

docs.title: SetPartyBucket(source, bucket) → boolean
docs.text:
Move an entire party into a routing bucket (private instance). Useful for dungeons, events.

RegisterNetEvent('dungeon:enter', function(dungeonId)
    local src = source
    local bucket = 1000 + dungeonId

    local ok = exports['avalon_party']:SetPartyBucket(src, bucket)
    if ok then
        TriggerClientEvent('dungeon:teleport', src, dungeonId)
    else
        TriggerClientEvent('ox_lib:notify', src, {
            type = 'error', description = 'You need a party to enter this dungeon!'
        })
    end
end)

-- Return to main world on exit
RegisterNetEvent('dungeon:exit', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:SetPartyBucket(source, 0)
end)

docs.title: GetPartyBucket(source) → number
docs.text:
Get the current routing bucket of the party (0 = main world).

local bucket = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyBucket(source)
print("Party is in bucket: " .. bucket)

docs.title: RequestMemberPick(mode, callbackEvent)
docs.text:
Activates member selection mode: the player can click on a party member to select them. Useful for targeting heals, buffs, or abilities at a specific member.

  • mode: "self" shows member cards · "target" uses raycast on peds
  • callbackEvent: local NetEvent name that receives { source, name }
-- Select a member to heal
RegisterCommand('heal_ally', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:RequestMemberPick('self', 'healing:onTargetPicked')
end)

RegisterNetEvent('healing:onTargetPicked', function(member)
    if not member then return end -- cancelled
    TriggerServerEvent('healing:applyHeal', member.source, 50)
end)

docs.title: CancelMemberPick()
docs.text:
Cancel the active member selection. The callback event is called with nil.

exports['avalon_party']:CancelMemberPick()

docs.title: GetPartyTarget() → { ped, netId, source, isPlayer } | nil
docs.text:
Returns info about the currently selected entity via TAB/CTRL targeting.

RegisterCommand('attack_target', function()
    local target = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyTarget()
    if not target then
        lib.notify({ type='error', description='No target selected' })
        return
    end

    if target.isPlayer then
        TriggerServerEvent('combat:attackPlayer', target.source)

Bienvenido a la documentación oficial de los scripts FiveM de AvalonStudios.

Aquí encontrarás la referencia completa de todos los scripts: configuración, exports disponibles y ejemplos de uso.

docs.title: Scripts Disponibles
docs.text: Script Descripción Exports avalon_coltivation Sistema de cultivo de plantas ✅ avalon_dustman Trabajo de basurero (solo/grupo) ❌ avalon_electrician Trabajo de electricista con minijuegos ❌ avalon_lumberjack Trabajo de leñador con minijuego ❌ avalon_mining Trabajo de minero con minijuego ❌ avalon_mounts Criaturas montables (dragones, grifos, pegasos...) ✅ avalon_party Sistema de party MMORPG con HUD, barras vitales, mazmorras ✅ avalon_robbery Sistema de robo a tiendas ❌ avalon_trash Sistema de búsqueda en basura ❌

docs.title: Dependencias Comunes
docs.text:
Todos los scripts requieren los siguientes recursos activos:

  • ox_lib — Librería base
  • ox_target — Sistema de interacciones
  • ox_inventory — Gestión de inventario
  • es_extended — Framework ESX

Consejo

Asegúrate de que todas las dependencias se inicien antes que los scripts Avalon en tu server.cfg.

docs.title: Cómo Usar los Exports
docs.text:
Los exports permiten que otros scripts llamen funciones de un script Avalon sin dependencias directas en el código.

ClientServer 
-- Llamar un export desde el lado cliente
exports['nombre-resource']:NombreFuncion(param1, param2)

-- Llamar un export desde el lado servidor
exports['nombre-resource']:NombreFuncion(param1, param2)

Importante

Los exports de cliente solo pueden llamarse desde scripts del lado cliente. Los exports de servidor solo pueden llamarse desde scripts del lado servidor.

Documentación por AvalonStudios — GitHub

docs.text: Opción Tipo Por defecto Descripción CONFIG.command boolean true Activar comandos para invocar criaturas CONFIG.commandName string "mount" Nombre del comando invocar (/mount) CONFIG.delCommand string "delMount" Nombre del comando despedir (/delMount) CONFIG.items boolean true Usar ítems del inventario para invocar CONFIG.invincible boolean false Hacer la criatura invencible CONFIG.maxrangedespawn number 200.0 Distancia antes del auto-despawn CONFIG.timeForSpawnAfterDeaths number 10000 Espera (ms) para invocar después de morir

docs.text:
CONFIG.flyWithTime = false   -- false = vuelo ilimitado
CONFIG.flyTimeMax  = 60000   -- ms de vuelo disponibles

docs.text: Criatura Variantes Puede volar necrodragon 5 ✅ griffon 3 ✅ pegaso 3 ✅ horse 3 ❌ alpaca 3 ❌

docs.title: API — Client-Side
docs.text:
local MountsAPI = exports['avalon_mounts']:API()

-- Invocar un necrodragon (variante 1)
MountsAPI.spawn("necrodragon", 1)

-- Verificar si hay una criatura invocada
if MountsAPI.isSpawned() then
    print("El jugador tiene una montura activa")
end

-- Despedir
MountsAPI.despawn()

docs.text:
Sistema de party estilo MMORPG para FiveM. Grupos con HUD en tiempo real, barras de vida personalizables, ready check, waypoint compartido, espectador automático y marcación de objetivos.

Versión: 1.0.0 | Autor: Avalon | Framework: ESX / QBCore / QBox / Standalone

docs.title: Dependencias
docs.text: Resource Requerido ox_lib ✅ ox_target ✅

docs.title: Comandos
docs.text: Comando Argumento Descripción /partyinvite [id jugador] Invitar a un jugador /partyaccept — Aceptar invitación /partydecline — Rechazar invitación /partyleave — Salir del party /partydisband — Disolver el party (líder) /partykick [id jugador] Expulsar un miembro (líder) /partytransfer [id jugador] Transferir liderazgo (líder) /partyready — Iniciar ready check (líder) /partywp — Compartir waypoint (líder)

docs.title: IsInParty(source) → boolean
docs.text:
if exports['avalon_party']:IsInParty(source) then
    -- lógica para jugadores en party
end

docs.title: GetPartyMembers(source) → table | nil
docs.text:
local members = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyMembers(source)
if members then
    for _, id in ipairs(members) do
        exports.ox_inventory:AddItem(id, 'pocion', 1)
    end
end

docs.title: GetPartyLeader(source) → number | nil
docs.text: local leader = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyLeader(source)

docs.title: SetMemberBar(source, barId, value, maxValue) → boolean
docs.text:
Actualiza una barra personalizada en el HUD visible para todo el party.

-- Actualizar mana tras lanzar un hechizo
RegisterNetEvent('magia:lanzar', function(coste)
    local nuevoMana = math.max(0, GetMana(source) - coste)
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberBar(source, 'mana', nuevoMana, 100)
end)

docs.title: SetMemberStatus(source, statusId, active) → boolean
docs.text:
Mostrar/ocultar un icono de estado en el HUD.

-- Mostrar "envenenado"
exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', true)
-- Quitar "envenenado"
exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', false)

docs.title: SetPartyBucket(source, bucket) → boolean
docs.text:
Mover todo el party a un routing bucket (instancia privada).

RegisterNetEvent('mazmorra:entrar', function(id)
    local ok = exports['avalon_party']:SetPartyBucket(source, 1000 + id)
    if not ok then
        TriggerClientEvent('ox_lib:notify', source, { type='error', description='Necesitas un party!' })
    end
end)

docs.title: GetPartyBucket(source) → number
docs.text: local bucket = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyBucket(source)

docs.title: RequestMemberPick(mode, callbackEvent)
docs.text:
Activa la selección de miembro con clic. El callback recibe { source, name }.

RegisterCommand('curar_aliado', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:RequestMemberPick('self', 'curacion:objetivo')
end)

RegisterNetEvent('curacion:objetivo', function(member)
    if not member then return end
    TriggerServerEvent('curacion:aplicar', member.source, 50)
end)

docs.title: CancelMemberPick()
docs.text: exports['avalon_party']:CancelMemberPick()

docs.title: GetPartyTarget() → { ped, netId, source, isPlayer } | nil
docs.text:
local target = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyTarget()
if target and target.isPlayer then
    TriggerServerEvent('combate:atacar', target.source)
end

docs.text:
Sistema de party estilo MMORPG para FiveM. Grupos com HUD em tempo real, barras de vida personalizáveis, ready check, waypoint partilhado, espetador automático e marcação de alvos.

Versão: 1.0.0 | Autor: Avalon | Framework: ESX / QBCore / QBox / Standalone

docs.title: Dependências
docs.text: Resource Obrigatório ox_lib ✅ ox_target ✅

docs.title: Comandos
docs.text: Comando Argumento Descrição /partyinvite [id jogador] Convidar jogador /partyaccept — Aceitar convite /partydecline — Recusar convite /partyleave — Sair do party /partydisband — Dissolver party (líder) /partykick [id jogador] Expulsar membro (líder) /partytransfer [id jogador] Transferir liderança (líder) /partyready — Iniciar ready check (líder) /partywp — Partilhar waypoint (líder)

docs.title: IsInParty(source) → boolean
docs.text:
if exports['avalon_party']:IsInParty(source) then
    -- lógica para jogadores em party
end

docs.title: GetPartyMembers(source) → table | nil
docs.text:
local members = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyMembers(source)
if members then
    for _, id in ipairs(members) do
        exports.ox_inventory:AddItem(id, 'pocao', 1)
    end
end

docs.title: GetPartyLeader(source) → number | nil
docs.text: local leader = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyLeader(source)

docs.title: SetMemberBar(source, barId, value, maxValue) → boolean
docs.text:
Atualiza uma barra personalizada no HUD visível para todo o party.

RegisterNetEvent('magia:lançar', function(custo)
    local novoMana = math.max(0, GetMana(source) - custo)
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberBar(source, 'mana', novoMana, 100)
end)

docs.title: SetMemberStatus(source, statusId, active) → boolean
docs.text:
exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', true)
exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', false)

docs.title: SetPartyBucket(source, bucket) → boolean
docs.text:
Move todo o party para um routing bucket (instância privada).

RegisterNetEvent('masmorra:entrar', function(id)
    local ok = exports['avalon_party']:SetPartyBucket(source, 1000 + id)
    if not ok then
        TriggerClientEvent('ox_lib:notify', source, { type='error', description='Precisas de um party!' })
    end
end)

docs.title: GetPartyBucket(source) → number
docs.text: local bucket = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyBucket(source)

docs.title: RequestMemberPick(mode, callbackEvent)
docs.text:
Ativa seleção de membro com clique. O callback recebe { source, name }.

RegisterCommand('curar_aliado', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:RequestMemberPick('self', 'cura:alvo')
end)

RegisterNetEvent('cura:alvo', function(member)
    if not member then return end
    TriggerServerEvent('cura:aplicar', member.source, 50)
end)

docs.title: CancelMemberPick()
docs.text: exports['avalon_party']:CancelMemberPick()

docs.title: GetPartyTarget() → { ped, netId, source, isPlayer } | nil
docs.text:
local target = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyTarget()
if target and target.isPlayer then
    TriggerServerEvent('combate:atacar', target.source)
end

docs.title: avalon_coltivation
docs.text:
Script per la coltivazione di piante in FiveM. Permette ai giocatori di piantare, annaffiare, fertilizzare e raccogliere diverse colture su terreni validi.

Versione: 1.0 | Autore: Mino | Database: ✅ MySQL

docs.title: Dipendenze
docs.text: Resource Obbligatoria ox_lib ✅ oxmysql ✅ ox_target ✅ ox_inventory ✅

docs.title: Installazione
docs.text:
1. Aggiungi la cartella avalon_coltivation nella tua directory resources/
  2. Esegui il file SQL (creato automaticamente all'avvio):
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS farming_plants (
    id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    plant_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    x FLOAT NOT NULL,
    y FLOAT NOT NULL,
    z FLOAT NOT NULL,
    growth FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    stage VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'seed',
    planted_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
    watered TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    has_lamp TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
    indoor TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
    heading FLOAT DEFAULT 0,
    boosts_used LONGTEXT NULL,
    owner VARCHAR(60) NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
  1. Aggiungi nell'server.cfg:
ensure avalon_coltivation

docs.title: Configurazione
docs.text: Il file config.lua si trova nella root dello script.

docs.title: Impostazioni Generali
docs.text: Opzione Tipo Default Descrizione CONFIG.MIN_PLANT_DISTANCE number 1.5 Distanza minima (in unità) tra due piante CONFIG.MIN_STAGE_TIME number 300000 Tempo minimo (ms) per avanzare di stadio CONFIG.StressMax number 1000000 Stress massimo per poter piantare CONFIG.StressValue number 100 Stress aggiunto ad ogni pianta posizionata

docs.title: Posizionamento
docs.text:
CONFIG.PLACEMENT = {
    rotateStep = 5.0,    -- gradi di rotazione per ogni step
    maxDistance = 5.0    -- distanza massima per posizionare una pianta
}

docs.title: Stadi di Crescita
docs.text:
CONFIG.STAGES = {
    { percent = 0,   name = 'seed' },    -- Seme
    { percent = 33,  name = 'small' },   -- Piccola
    { percent = 66,  name = 'grown' },   -- Cresciuta
    { percent = 100, name = 'ready' }    -- Pronta al raccolto
}

docs.title: Raccolta
docs.text:
CONFIG.HARVEST = {
    tool          = 'shears',  -- item necessario per raccogliere
    breakChance   = 0.2,       -- probabilità di rompere la pianta senza tool (20%)
    toolBreakChance = 0.05,    -- probabilità di rompere usando il tool (5%)
    skillBonus    = 0.1        -- bonus successo con skill "coltivazione" (+10%)
}

docs.title: Piante
docs.text:
Ogni pianta è configurabile nella tabella CONFIG.PLANTS.

CONFIG.PLANTS = {
    grain = {
        seed        = 'seme_grano',             -- nome item seme
        growthTime  = 30 * 60 * 1000,           -- tempo crescita completa (ms)
        yield       = { item = 'grano', quantity = 5 }, -- raccolto
        waterNeeded = true,                     -- richiede annaffiatura
        props = { ... }                         -- modelli 3D per ogni stadio
    },
    -- ...
}
Pianta Seme Tempo Raccolto Acqua grain seme_grano 30 min 5x grano ✅ canapa seme_canapa 45 min 3x canapa ✅ coca seme_coca 60 min 2x coca ✅ fungus seme_fungo 20 min 4x funghi ❌ papavero seme_papavero 50 min 2x papavero ✅

docs.title: Tool / Attrezzi
docs.text:
Gli attrezzi accelerano la crescita e si applicano in stadi specifici.

Tool Item Moltiplicatore Si rompe Stadi Annaffiatoio watering_can -25% tempo ❌ seed, small Fertilizzante fertilizer -40% tempo ✅ (uso singolo) small, grown Lampada grow_lamp -15% tempo ✅ (uso singolo) seed, small, grown

docs.title: Terreni Validi
docs.text:
Lo script valida il terreno tramite collision material. Sono accettati:

  • Erba — GrassLong, Grass, GrassShort
  • Terra / Fango — Soil, DirtTrack, MudHard, MudSoft, MudDeep
  • Palude — Marsh, MarshDeep
  • Sabbia — SandLoose, SandCompact, SandWet, SandDryDeep
  • Argilla — ClaySoft, ClayHard

Aggiungere terreni personalizzati

Aggiungi l'hash del material nella tabella CONFIG.VALID_SOIL_MATERIALS: 

CONFIG.VALID_SOIL_MATERIALS["0xTUOHASH"] = true

docs.title: Export Disponibili
docs.text:
Tipo: Client-Side

Questi export sono registrati lato client e vanno chiamati da script client.

Ogni export avvia il processo di pianta del seme corrispondente per il giocatore locale.

docs.title: seme_grano
docs.text:
Avvia il piazzamento del seme di grano.

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_grano()

docs.title: seme_canapa

Avvia il piazzamento del seme di canapa.

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_canapa()

docs.title: seme_coca

docs.title: seme_fungo

Avvia il piazzamento del seme di fungo.

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_fungo()

docs.title: seme_papavero

Avvia il piazzamento del seme di papavero.

docs.title: Piantare da un altro script
docs.text:
-- client/main.lua del tuo script

-- Assegna il piazzamento del grano a un tasto o interazione
RegisterCommand('pianta_grano', function()
    exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_grano()
end)

-- Oppure tramite ox_target
exports.ox_target:addBoxZone({
    coords = vector3(100.0, 200.0, 30.0),
    size   = vector3(2, 2, 2),
    options = {
        {
            label = 'Pianta grano',
            onSelect = function()
                exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_grano()
            end
        }
    }
})

docs.title: Piantare tutti i tipi disponibili (menu)
docs.text:
-- client/main.lua del tuo script
local seeds = {
    { label = 'Grano',    export = 'seme_grano'    },
    { label = 'Canapa',   export = 'seme_canapa'   },
    { label = 'Coca',     export = 'seme_coca'      },
    { label = 'Fungo',    export = 'seme_fungo'     },
    { label = 'Papavero', export = 'seme_papavero'  },
}

RegisterCommand('apri_menu_piante', function()
    local options = {}
    for _, seed in ipairs(seeds) do
        local name = seed.export
        table.insert(options, {
            title = seed.label,
            onSelect = function()
                exports['avalon_coltivation'][name]()
            end
        })
    end
    lib.registerContext({ id = 'menu_piante', title = 'Piante', options = options })
    lib.showContext('menu_piante')
end)

docs.title: Database
docs.text:
La tabella farming_plants salva ogni pianta persistentemente.

Colonna Tipo Descrizione id INT ID univoco plant_type VARCHAR Tipo pianta (grain, canapa, ecc.) x, y, z FLOAT Posizione nel mondo growth FLOAT Percentuale crescita (0-100) stage VARCHAR Stadio attuale (seed/small/grown/ready) planted_at BIGINT Timestamp pianta (ms) watered TINYINT Annaffiata (0/1) has_lamp TINYINT Lampada attiva (0/1) indoor TINYINT In interni (0/1) heading FLOAT Rotazione pianta boosts_used LONGTEXT JSON tool usati owner VARCHAR Identifier proprietario

docs.title: avalon_dustman

Script per il lavoro da netturbino in FiveM. Supporta la modalità singola (furgoncino) e modalità gruppo (camion). I giocatori raccolgono sacchi dai bidoni in settori assegnati casualmente.

Versione: 1.0 | Autore: Mino

ensure avalon_dustman

docs.title: Impostazioni Generali
docs.text: Opzione Tipo Default Descrizione Config.Debug boolean true Abilita log di debug nella console Config.PartyMembers number 4 Numero massimo di giocatori in gruppo Config.BagsPerSector number 10 Sacchi da raccogliere per completare un settore Config.StressMax number 10000 Stress massimo per fare il lavoro Config.StressValue number 100 Stress aggiunto ogni volta che si raccoglie un cestino

Config.MarkerColor = { red = 0, green = 255, blue = 0, alpha = 120 }

docs.title: Bidoni (Prop)
docs.text:
La tabella Config.AllBins elenca tutti i modelli riconosciuti come contenitori da svuotare. Puoi aggiungere o rimuovere prop in base alla mappa del tuo server.

Config.AllBins = {
    -- Cestini piccoli/medi
    "prop_bin_01a", "prop_bin_02a", "prop_bin_03a", "prop_bin_04a",
    "prop_bin_05a", "prop_bin_06a", "prop_bin_07a",
    "prop_cs_bin_01", "prop_cs_rub_binbag_01",
    "prop_rub_binbag_sd_01", "prop_rub_binbag_sd_02",
    "prop_rub_binbag_sd_03", "prop_rub_binbag_sd_04",
    -- Dumpster grandi
    "prop_dumpster_01a", "prop_dumpster_02a", "prop_dumpster_02b",
    "prop_dumpster_03a", "prop_dumpster_03b",
    "prop_dumpster_04a", "prop_dumpster_04b"
}

docs.title: Settori
docs.text:
Ogni settore rappresenta una zona della mappa in cui vengono assegnati i bidoni. Puoi aggiungere quanti settori vuoi.

Config.Sectors = {
    {
        name  = "Downtown",
        gps   = vec3(215.0, -810.0, 30.0),  -- punto GPS sul blip
        area  = {
            center = vec3(215.0, -810.0, 30.0),
            radius = 180.0                   -- raggio dell'area in unità
        },
        props = Config.AllBins               -- prop accettati in questo settore
    },
    {
        name  = "Strawberry",
        gps   = vec3(120.0, -1340.0, 29.0),
        area  = { center = vec3(120.0, -1340.0, 29.0), radius = 160.0 },
        props = Config.AllBins
    },
    {
        name  = "Vespucci",
        gps   = vec3(-1220.0, -910.0, 12.0),
        area  = { center = vec3(-1220.0, -910.0, 12.0), radius = 200.0 },
        props = Config.AllBins
    }
}

Aggiungere un nuovo settore

Copia uno dei blocchi sopra e modifica name, gps, area.center e area.radius in base alla zona desiderata.

docs.title: Export Disponibili
docs.text:
Nessun export registrato

avalon_dustman non espone export pubblici. Tutte le funzionalità sono interne allo script.

docs.title: Funzionamento
docs.text:
[Giocatore] → NPC "Inizia lavoro" → Scelta modalità (Singolo/Gruppo)
    ↓
Spawn veicolo → Assegnazione settore casuale → GPS impostato
    ↓
Raccolta bidoni (ox_target su ogni prop) → Sacco in inventario → Deposito nel camion
    ↓
Completati Config.BagsPerSector sacchi → Nuovo settore assegnato
    ↓
Restituzione veicolo → NPC "Consegna ticket" → Pagamento

Modalità Gruppo

In modalità gruppo, il leader invita altri giocatori tramite ox_target sul loro ped. Il camion può avere un massimo di Config.Group.maxTrucks attivi contemporaneamente sul server.

    { difficulty = 3, vector3(887.80,  -986.57,  44.17) }, -- Difficile

docs.title: Funzionamento
docs.text:
[Giocatore] → NPC → Scelta difficoltà (1/2/3)
    ↓

docs.title: avalon_mounts
docs.text:
Script per l'utilizzo di creature cavalcabili in FiveM. Permette ai giocatori di evocare, montare e gestire creature fantastiche (draghi, grifoni, pegasi, cavalli, alpaca) tramite comandi o item nell'inventario.

Versione: 1.0 | Autore: Mino

docs.title: Dipendenze
docs.text: Resource Obbligatoria Note ox_lib ✅ Notifiche e utility ox_inventory ❌ Solo se CONFIG.items = true ox_fuel ❌ Mantiene carburante al massimo automaticamente qbx_core ❌ Integrazione chiavi QBox qbx_vehiclekeys ❌ Integrazione chiavi QBox

docs.title: Installazione
docs.text: ensure avalon_mounts

docs.title: Utilizzo Base (Comandi)
docs.text: Quando CONFIG.command = true, i giocatori possono evocare e congedare le creature direttamente dalla chat senza bisogno di item o altri script.

docs.title: Evocare una creatura
docs.text:
/mount <nome> <variante>
Parametro Tipo Descrizione nome string Tipo di creatura (vedi tabella sotto) variante number Numero variante (1, 2, 3...)

Esempi:

/mount necrodragon 1
/mount griffon 2
/mount pegaso 1
/mount horse 3
/mount alpaca 1

docs.title: Congedare la creatura
docs.text:
/delMount

Rimuove la creatura attualmente evocata dal gioco.

docs.title: Tasti in Gioco
docs.text:
Una volta evocata la creatura, questi tasti controllano le azioni:

Azione Tasto Default Codice Config Monta / Smonta E CONFIG.keyMount = 51 Congeda la creatura H CONFIG.keyDelete = 74 Attiva / Disattiva volo X CONFIG.keyFlymode = 73

Cambio tasti

Per cambiare i tasti modifica i valori numerici in config.lua. I codici corrispondono ai FiveM control codes.

docs.title: Creature Disponibili
docs.text: Creatura Comando Varianti Può volare Necrodragon /mount necrodragon 5 (1–5) ✅ Griffon /mount griffon 3 (1–3) ✅ Pegaso /mount pegaso 3 (1–3) ✅ Horse /mount horse 3 (1–3) ❌ Alpaca /mount alpaca 3 (1–3) ❌

docs.title: Impostazioni Generali
docs.text: Opzione Tipo Default Descrizione CONFIG.command boolean true Abilita i comandi /mount e /delMount CONFIG.commandName string "mount" Nome del comando evoca CONFIG.delCommand string "delMount" Nome del comando congeda CONFIG.items boolean true Abilita spawn tramite item (richiede ox_inventory) CONFIG.invincible boolean false Rende la creatura invincibile CONFIG.maxrangedespawn number 200.0 Distanza (unità) per il despawn automatico CONFIG.timeForSpawnAfterDeaths number 10000 Attesa (ms) per evocare dopo la morte

docs.title: Sistema Volo
docs.text:
CONFIG.flyWithTime = false   -- false = volo illimitato
CONFIG.flyTimeMax  = 60000   -- ms di volo (solo se flyWithTime = true)
CONFIG.flyCooldown = 60000   -- ms di ricarica prima di poter rivolare

docs.title: Velocità Massima
docs.text:
Valore di moltiplicazione interno — da testare e calibrare sul proprio server.

CONFIG.MaxSpeed = {
    ["necrodragon"] = 100.0,
    ["griffon"]     = 50.0,
    ["pegaso"]      = 70.0,
    ["alpaca"]      = 50.0,
    ["horse"]       = 70.0,
}

docs.title: Notifiche
docs.text:
CONFIG.notify          = true
CONFIG.notifyTitle     = "Avalon Mounts"
CONFIG.notifyPosition  = "top"       -- top, bottom, top-left, top-right, ecc.
CONFIG.notifyIcon      = "ban"
CONFIG.notifyIconColor = '#C53030'
CONFIG.notifyDuration  = 5000        -- ms

docs.title: Testi UI
docs.text:
CONFIG.lang = {
    mount        = "Sali",
    unmount      = "Scendi",
    deleteMount  = "Congeda",
    description  = "La creatura è stanca",
    description1 = "La creatura non si è ancora ripresa",
    description2 = "La creatura si è ripresa",
    description3 = "Sei morto recentemente, devi aspettare per richiamare la creatura",
}

docs.title: API — Client-Side
docs.text:
Tipo: Client-Side

Restituisce l'oggetto API con tutte le funzioni pubbliche. Da usare in altri script per controllare il sistema mounts in modo programmativo.

local MountsAPI = exports['avalon_mounts']:API()

docs.title: Funzioni
docs.text: Funzione Descrizione MountsAPI.spawn(name, color) Evoca una creatura (name = tipo, color = numero variante) MountsAPI.despawn() Congeda la creatura attiva MountsAPI.isSpawned() true se una creatura è evocata MountsAPI.isOnMount() true se il giocatore è montato MountsAPI.getVehicle() Restituisce l'entità veicolo della creatura MountsAPI.getData(model) Dati di configurazione di una creatura specifica MountsAPI.getAllData() Dati di tutte le creature MountsAPI.getBlacklist(vehicle) Controlla se un veicolo è in blacklist MountsAPI.sendInfo(data) Invia dati di stato MountsAPI.deleteEnt(ent) Elimina un'entità specifica MountsAPI.playAnimation(prop, anim, dict, loop) Riproduce un'animazione sulla creatura MountsAPI.syncInvisible(ent, bool) Sincronizza visibilità tra tutti i client MountsAPI.syncHair(ent, head) Sincronizza variante testa

docs.title: Esempi
docs.text:
-- client/main.lua del tuo script
local MountsAPI = exports['avalon_mounts']:API()

-- Evoca un griffon variante 2
MountsAPI.spawn("griffon", 2)

-- Controlla se il giocatore è a cavallo
if MountsAPI.isOnMount() then
    print("Giocatore montato")
end

-- Ottieni la posizione della creatura
local mount = MountsAPI.getVehicle()
if mount then
    local coords = GetEntityCoords(mount)
    print(("Mount a: %.1f, %.1f, %.1f"):format(coords.x, coords.y, coords.z))
end

-- Congeda
MountsAPI.despawn()

docs.title: Export Item Dinamici — Client-Side
docs.text:
Tipo: Client-Side — richiede CONFIG.items = true

Un export per ogni variante creatura, creati automaticamente all'avvio. Usati internamente da ox_inventory quando il giocatore usa l'item, ma possono essere chiamati anche da altri script.

Il formato è: nomeCreatura_numeroVariante

exports['avalon_mounts']:necrodragon_1()   -- Necrodragon variante 1
exports['avalon_mounts']:necrodragon_2()   -- Necrodragon variante 2
exports['avalon_mounts']:necrodragon_3()
exports['avalon_mounts']:necrodragon_4()
exports['avalon_mounts']:necrodragon_5()

exports['avalon_mounts']:griffon_1()
exports['avalon_mounts']:griffon_2()
exports['avalon_mounts']:griffon_3()

exports['avalon_mounts']:pegaso_1()
exports['avalon_mounts']:pegaso_2()
exports['avalon_mounts']:pegaso_3()

exports['avalon_mounts']:horse_1()
exports['avalon_mounts']:horse_2()
exports['avalon_mounts']:horse_3()

exports['avalon_mounts']:alpaca_1()
exports['avalon_mounts']:alpaca_2()
exports['avalon_mounts']:alpaca_3()

Configurazione item in ox_inventory

Ogni item mount va registrato in ox_inventory con il nome uguale al nome export (es. necrodragon_1). Lo script gestisce automaticamente l'azione di uso quando CONFIG.items = true.

docs.title: ox_fuel
docs.text: Se presente, il carburante della creatura viene mantenuto al massimo ogni 5 secondi automaticamente. Nessuna configurazione richiesta.

docs.title: QBox (qbx_core + qbx_vehiclekeys)
docs.text: Se presenti, le chiavi del veicolo creatura vengono assegnate automaticamente al giocatore ogni 10 secondi mentre la creatura è attiva.

docs.title: avalon_party
docs.text:
Sistema party in stile MMORPG per FiveM. Permette ai giocatori di formare gruppi con HUD in tempo reale, barre vitali personalizzabili, ready check, waypoint condiviso, spettatore automatico e sistema di marcatura bersagli.

Versione: 1.0.0 | Autore: Avalon | Framework: ESX / QBCore / QBox / Standalone

docs.title: Dipendenze
docs.text: Resource Obbligatoria ox_lib ✅ ox_target ✅

docs.title: Installazione
docs.text: ensure avalon_party

docs.title: Comandi
docs.text:
I giocatori possono gestire il party direttamente dalla chat:

Comando Argomento Descrizione /partyinvite [id giocatore] Invita un giocatore nel party /partyaccept — Accetta l'invito ricevuto /partydecline — Rifiuta l'invito ricevuto /partyleave — Lascia il party /partydisband — Scioglie il party (solo leader) /partykick [id giocatore] Espelle un membro (solo leader) /partytransfer [id giocatore] Trasferisce la leadership (solo leader) /partyready — Avvia il ready check (solo leader) /partywp — Condivide il waypoint attuale (solo leader)

docs.title: Tasti
docs.text:
Tasto Azione F5 Apre il menu gestione party F1 Accetta invito in arrivo F2 Rifiuta invito in arrivo F3 Conferma "Pronto" (ready check) F4 Conferma "Non pronto" (ready check) TAB Cicla bersagli vicini in modalità targeting (solo leader)

Cambia i tasti

Tutti i tasti sono configurabili in config.lua sotto Config.Keys.

docs.title: Impostazioni Generali
docs.text: Opzione Default Descrizione Config.maxPartySize 6 Numero massimo di membri per party Config.inviteExpiry 30000 ms prima che un invito scada Config.offlineGracePeriod 120000 ms prima di rimuovere un membro disconnesso Config.readyCheckTimeout 15000 ms di durata del ready check

docs.title: Feature (Attiva/Disattiva)
docs.text:
Config.Features = {
    distance   = true,  -- distanza in metri sui member card
    readyCheck = true,  -- sistema ready check
    waypoint   = true,  -- waypoint condiviso dal leader
    spectator  = true,  -- spettatore automatico alla morte
    targetMark = true,  -- marcatura bersagli con simboli (solo leader)
}

docs.title: HUD

Config.UI = {
    position       = 'top-left', -- 'top-left' | 'top-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-right'
    offsetX        = 20,
    offsetY        = 20,
    hudWidth       = 260,        -- larghezza card in px
    scale          = 1.0,        -- 1.0=1080p · 1.4=1440p · 1.7=4K
    showStatuses   = true,
    updateInterval = 500,        -- ms tra aggiornamenti vitali
    pickClick      = 'right',    -- tasto mouse per selezionare un membro

docs.title: Barre Vitali
docs.text:
Le barre con builtin = true si aggiornano automaticamente dai nativi GTA (zero traffico server). Le barre con builtin = false devono essere aggiornate tramite l'export SetMemberBar.

ID Label Builtin Colore health HP ✅ Rosso stamina Stamina ✅ Verde mana Mana ❌ Blu shield Shield ❌ Grigio rage Rage ❌ Arancio

docs.title: Status
docs.text: ID Label Icona combat In Combat ⚔️ poisoned Poisoned ☠️ buffed Buffed ✨ dead Dead 💀 afk AFK 💤

docs.title: Simboli Bersaglio (Leader)
docs.text: ID Label Icona warning Attenzione ⚠️ target Target 🎯 attack Attacca ❌ defend Difendi 🛡️ heal Cura 💊 focus Focus ⭐

docs.title: IsInParty(source)
docs.text:
Controlla se un giocatore è attualmente in un party.

Parametri: source — ID server del giocatore Ritorna: boolean

-- server/main.lua
local inParty = exports['avalon_party']:IsInParty(source)

if inParty then
    -- blocca accesso a una zona solo-player
    TriggerClientEvent('zone:denied', source, "Non puoi entrare in party")
end

docs.title: GetPartyMembers(source)
docs.text:
Restituisce la lista degli ID server di tutti i membri del party del giocatore (leader incluso).

Parametri: source — qualsiasi membro del party Ritorna: table di sources, oppure nil se non è in party

-- server/main.lua
local members = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyMembers(source)

if members then
    print("Il party ha " .. #members .. " membri")
    for _, memberId in ipairs(members) do
        -- dai un item a tutti i membri del party
        exports.ox_inventory:AddItem(memberId, 'health_potion', 1)
    end
end

docs.title: GetPartyLeader(source)
docs.text:
Restituisce l'ID server del leader del party.

Parametri: source — qualsiasi membro del party Ritorna: number (source del leader), oppure nil

-- server/main.lua
local leader = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyLeader(source)

if leader == source then
    print("Questo giocatore è il leader del suo party")
end

docs.title: SetMemberBar(source, barId, value, maxValue)
docs.text:
Aggiorna il valore di una barra custom nel HUD del party per un giocatore specifico. Visibile a tutti i membri del suo party in tempo reale.

Parametri: | Nome | Tipo | Descrizione | |------|------|-------------| | source | number | ID server del giocatore | | barId | string | ID della barra ("mana", "shield", "rage", o custom) | | value | number | Valore attuale | | maxValue | number | Valore massimo |

Ritorna: boolean — true se aggiornato, false se il giocatore non è in party

-- server/main.lua — sistema mana
RegisterNetEvent('magic:castSpell', function(manaCost)
    local src = source
    local currentMana = GetPlayerMana(src) -- funzione del tuo script
    local newMana = math.max(0, currentMana - manaCost)

    SetPlayerMana(src, newMana)

    -- aggiorna la barra nel HUD del party
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberBar(src, 'mana', newMana, 100)
end)

-- Esempio: shield che si riduce ai danni
RegisterNetEvent('combat:takeDamage', function(damage)
    local src = source
    local shield = GetPlayerShield(src)
    local newShield = math.max(0, shield - damage)

    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberBar(src, 'shield', newShield, 100)
end)

docs.title: SetMemberStatus(source, statusId, active)
docs.text:
Attiva o disattiva un'icona di stato sul member card HUD.

Parametri: | Nome | Tipo | Descrizione | |------|------|-------------| | source | number | ID server del giocatore | | statusId | string | ID dello status ("combat", "poisoned", "buffed", "dead", "afk") | | active | boolean | true per mostrarlo, false per nasconderlo |

Ritorna: boolean

-- server/main.lua

-- Mostra "In Combat" quando il giocatore spara
AddEventHandler('weaponDamageEvent', function(source)
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'combat', true)

    -- Rimuovi dopo 5 secondi
    SetTimeout(5000, function()
        exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'combat', false)
    end)
end)

-- Mostra "Poisoned" quando il giocatore viene avvelenato
RegisterNetEvent('poison:apply', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', true)
end)

RegisterNetEvent('poison:cure', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', false)
end)

-- Mostra "Dead" alla morte
AddEventHandler('baseevents:onPlayerDied', function(source)
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'dead', true)
end)

docs.title: SetPartyBucket(source, bucket)
docs.text:
Sposta l'intero party di un giocatore in un routing bucket (dimensione separata). Utile per dungeon, istanze private, eventi.

Parametri: | Nome | Tipo | Descrizione | |------|------|-------------| | source | number | Qualsiasi membro del party | | bucket | number | ID del routing bucket di destinazione (0 = mondo principale) |

Ritorna: boolean

-- server/main.lua — dungeon instanziato
RegisterNetEvent('dungeon:enter', function(dungeonId)
    local src = source

    -- Genera un bucket univoco per questo dungeon
    local bucket = dungeonId + 1000

    local ok = exports['avalon_party']:SetPartyBucket(src, bucket)

    if ok then
        TriggerClientEvent('dungeon:teleport', src, dungeonId)
        print("Party spostato nel bucket " .. bucket)
    else
        TriggerClientEvent('ox_lib:notify', src, {
            type = 'error',
            description = 'Devi essere in un party per entrare nel dungeon!'
        })
    end
end)

-- Riporta al mondo principale all'uscita
RegisterNetEvent('dungeon:exit', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:SetPartyBucket(source, 0)
end)

docs.title: GetPartyBucket(source)
docs.text:
Ottiene il routing bucket attuale del party.

Parametri: source — qualsiasi membro del party Ritorna: number (0 = mondo principale)

local bucket = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyBucket(source)
print("Il party è nel bucket: " .. bucket)

docs.title: RequestMemberPick(mode, callbackEvent)
docs.text:
Attiva la modalità selezione membro: il giocatore può cliccare su un membro del party nel mondo per selezionarlo. Utile per puntare cure, abilità o azioni a un membro specifico.

Parametri: | Nome | Tipo | Valori | Descrizione | |------|------|--------|-------------| | mode | string | "self" / "target" | "self" mostra solo i member card · "target" usa raycast verso i ped | | callbackEvent | string | nome evento | Evento NetEvent locale che riceve il risultato |

L'evento di callback riceve: { source, name }

-- client/main.lua del tuo script

-- Mostra il picker per selezionare un alleato da curare
RegisterCommand('cure', function()
    -- Attiva picker: click destro su un membro → ricevi l'evento
    exports['avalon_party']:RequestMemberPick('self', 'myScript:onMemberPicked')
end)

-- Ricevi il risultato
RegisterNetEvent('myScript:onMemberPicked', function(member)
    if not member then return end -- picker annullato

    print("Hai selezionato: " .. member.name .. " (source: " .. member.source .. ")")

    -- Cura il membro selezionato
    TriggerServerEvent('healing:applyHeal', member.source, 50)
end)

-- Esempio con timeout automatico
RegisterCommand('buff', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:RequestMemberPick('self', 'myScript:onBuffTarget')

    -- Cancella dopo 10 secondi se non si seleziona nessuno
    SetTimeout(10000, function()
        exports['avalon_party']:CancelMemberPick()
    end)
end)

RegisterNetEvent('myScript:onBuffTarget', function(member)
    if not member then return end
    TriggerServerEvent('buff:apply', member.source, 'speed', 30000)
end)

docs.title: CancelMemberPick()
docs.text:
Cancella la modalità selezione membro attiva senza selezionare nessuno. L'evento callback viene chiamato con nil.

-- Annulla la selezione con ESC
RegisterKeyMapping('cancel_pick', 'Annulla selezione', 'keyboard', 'ESCAPE')
RegisterCommand('cancel_pick', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:CancelMemberPick()
end)

docs.title: GetPartyTarget()
docs.text:
Restituisce le informazioni sull'entità attualmente selezionata con il sistema di targeting (TAB o CTRL). Disponibile solo se Config.Features.targetMark = true.

Ritorna: table { ped, netId, source, isPlayer } oppure nil se nessun target attivo

Campo Tipo Descrizione ped number Handle dell'entità netId number Network ID dell'entità source number Server ID (se è un player, altrimenti nil) isPlayer boolean true se il target è un altro giocatore 
-- client/main.lua del tuo script

-- Attacca il target selezionato dal leader
RegisterCommand('attack_target', function()
    local target = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyTarget()

    if not target then
        -- Nessun target selezionato
        lib.notify({ type = 'error', description = 'Nessun bersaglio selezionato' })
        return
    end

    if target.isPlayer then
        print("Target: giocatore " .. target.source)
        TriggerServerEvent('combat:attackPlayer', target.source)
    else
        print("Target: NPC con netId " .. target.netId)
        TriggerServerEvent('combat:attackNpc', target.netId)
    end
end)

-- Controlla continuamente il target e mostra un mirino
CreateThread(function()
    while true do
        Wait(0)
        local target = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyTarget()

        if target then
            -- Disegna un marker sul target
            local coords = GetEntityCoords(target.ped)
            DrawMarker(1, coords.x, coords.y, coords.z + 2.0,
                0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0,
                0.3, 0.3, 0.3,
                255, 0, 0, 150,
                false, true, 2, false, nil, nil, false)
        end
    end
end)

docs.title: Esempio Completo — Script di Magia
docs.text:
Integrazione completa di avalon_party in uno script che gestisce mana, shield e status.

-- server/main.lua dello script magia

local function updateBars(src, mana, shield)
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberBar(src, 'mana',   mana,   100)
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberBar(src, 'shield', shield, 100)
end

-- Inizializza i valori al login
AddEventHandler('esx:playerLoaded', function(source)
    updateBars(source, 100, 100)
end)

-- Cast di un incantesimo
RegisterNetEvent('magic:cast', function(spellName, targetSource)
    local src = source
    local mana   = GetPlayerMana(src)
    local shield = GetPlayerShield(src)
    local cost   = SpellCosts[spellName] or 10

    if mana < cost then
        TriggerClientEvent('ox_lib:notify', src, { type='error', description='Mana insufficiente!' })
        return
    end

    mana = mana - cost
    SetPlayerMana(src, mana)
    updateBars(src, mana, shield)

    -- Mostra "Buffed" agli alleati del party
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(src, 'buffed', true)
    SetTimeout(5000, function()
        exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(src, 'buffed', false)
    end)
end)

-- Avvelenamento
RegisterNetEvent('poison:apply', function()
    local src = source
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(src, 'poisoned', true)
    SetTimeout(30000, function()
        exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(src, 'poisoned', false)
    end)
end)

-- Dungeon: teletrasporta l'intero party
RegisterNetEvent('dungeon:enter', function(id)
    local src    = source
    local bucket = 1000 + id

    if not exports['avalon_party']:IsInParty(src) then
        TriggerClientEvent('ox_lib:notify', src, { type='error', description='Devi essere in party!' })
        return
    end

    exports['avalon_party']:SetPartyBucket(src, bucket)

    local members = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyMembers(src)
    for _, memberId in ipairs(members) do
        TriggerClientEvent('dungeon:teleport', memberId, id)
    end
end)

docs.title: avalon_robbery
docs.text:
Script per la rapina ai negozi in FiveM. I giocatori puntano un'arma verso il commesso per iniziare la rapina, raccogliere denaro progressivamente e aprire la cassaforte tramite minigioco.

Versione: 1.0 | Autore: Mino

docs.title: Dipendenze
docs.text: Resource Obbligatoria ox_lib ✅ ESX (es_extended) ✅ ox_target ✅ ox_inventory ✅

docs.title: Installazione
docs.text: ensure avalon_robbery

docs.title: Configurazione
docs.text: DEBUG = false  -- true per abilitare log in console

docs.title: Negozi (CONFIG.SHOPS)
docs.text:
Ogni negozio è una voce nella tabella CONFIG.SHOPS identificata da una chiave unica.

CONFIG.SHOPS = {
    ["shop00"] = {
        -- ...
    },
    ["shop01"] = {
        -- ...
    },
}

docs.title: Opzioni per ogni negozio
docs.text: Chiave Tipo Descrizione ped.model string Modello del commesso NPC ped.coords vector4 Posizione e heading del commesso lockbox.coords vector4 Posizione e heading della cassaforte lockbox.weight number Peso della cassaforte (usato internamente) items table Lista item nella cassaforte {name, quantity} policeNotify string Testo dell'alert inviato alla polizia jobToNotify string Job ESX a cui inviare la notifica ("police") tools string Item necessario per aprire la cassaforte minigame.game string Tipo di minigioco ("Locked") timeForRobbery number Durata rapina cassa in ms startMoney number Denaro totale dalla cassa all'inizio startMoneyStep number Denaro dato ogni step di animazione startMoneyDelay number Ms tra ogni step di denaro shopResetTime number Ms prima che il negozio sia di nuovo rapinabile

docs.title: Esempio completo
docs.text:
CONFIG.SHOPS = {
    ["shop00"] = {
        ped = {
            model  = "s_m_m_ammucountry",
            coords = vector4(-1221.71, -908.18, 12.326, 0.0)
        },
        lockbox = {
            coords = vector4(-1221.310, -915.907, 11.096, 123.85),
            weight = 50000  -- 50 kg
        },
        items = {
            { name = "money",  quantity = 1000 },
            { name = "weed",   quantity = 5    }
        },
        policeNotify  = "Attività sospetta all Negozio di alimentari!",
        jobToNotify   = "police",
        metadataNotify = nil,
        tools         = "stetoscopio",
        minigame      = { game = "Locked", options = nil },
        timeForRobbery  = 30000,   -- 30 secondi
        startMoney      = 500,
        startMoneyStep  = 50,
        startMoneyDelay = 1000,
        shopResetTime   = 1800000  -- 30 minuti
    }
}

Aggiungere un nuovo negozio

Copia il blocco ["shop00"] e assegna una nuova chiave (es. "shop01"). Cambia coordinate ped, lockbox e contenuto items.

docs.title: Export Disponibili
docs.text:
Nessun export registrato

avalon_robbery non espone export pubblici.

docs.title: Funzionamento
docs.text:
[Giocatore con arma] → Punta arma verso il commesso NPC
    ↓
NPC si "spaventa" → StartRobbery() → Animazione mani alzate commesso
    ↓
Giocatore riceve denaro ogni startMoneyDelay ms (startMoneyStep $)
    ↓ (rimane in zona, continua a puntare)
Raggiunti tutti i soldi della cassa OR il giocatore si allontana → Stop
    ↓
[Opzionale] ox_target sulla cassaforte → Usa item tools → Minigioco "Locked"
    ↓
Successo minigioco → Stash temporaneo con gli items della cassaforte
    ↓
shopResetTime → Negozio resettato e di nuovo rapinabile

Notifica Polizia

All'inizio della rapina viene inviato un alert ESX al job jobToNotify. Assicurati che il tuo framework gestisca l'evento SendAlert.

docs.title: avalon_trash
docs.text:
Script per la ricerca negli oggetti abbandonati in FiveM. I giocatori possono cercare in cestini, cassonetti e cassette postali per trovare loot randomico, con sistema di cooldown e stash temporaneo.

Versione: 1.0 | Autore: Mino

docs.title: Dipendenze
docs.text: Resource Obbligatoria ox_lib ✅ ox_target ✅ ox_inventory ✅

docs.title: Installazione
docs.text: ensure avalon_trash

docs.title: Tempi
docs.text:
CONFIG.SEARCH_TIME        = 5000      -- ms di ricerca (progress bar)
CONFIG.COOLDOWN           = 60        -- secondi prima di poter cercare nello stesso contenitore
CONFIG.TRASH_REFRESH_TIME = 5 * 60    -- secondi prima di rigenerare il loot in tutti i contenitori

docs.title: Animazione
docs.text:
CONFIG.ANIMATION = {
    dict = "amb@prop_human_bum_bin@base",
    anim = "base"
}

docs.title: Stash
docs.text:
CONFIG.STASH = {
    slots  = 10,    -- slot dello stash temporaneo
    weight = 50000  -- peso massimo dello stash (grammi)
}

docs.title: Categorie Contenitori
docs.text:
Ogni categoria ha item richiesti (per aprire il contenitore) e item bonus che moltiplicano le probabilità.

CONFIG.TRASH_CATEGORIES = {

    small_bin = {
        label         = "Cestino",
        requiredItems = {},                 -- nessun item richiesto
        bonusItems    = {
            ["trash_gloves"] = { chanceMultiplier = 1.25, amountMultiplier = 1.4 }
        }
    },

    dumpster = {
        label         = "Cassonetto",
        requiredItems = { "trash_gloves" }, -- richiede guanti
        bonusItems    = {
            ["trash_gloves"] = { chanceMultiplier = 1.4, amountMultiplier = 1.6 }
        }
    },

    mailbox = {
        label         = "Cassetta delle lettere",
        requiredItems = { "crowbar" },      -- richiede piede di porco
        bonusItems    = {
            ["crowbar"] = { chanceMultiplier = 1.6, amountMultiplier = 1.0 }
        }
    }
}
Categoria Item Richiesto Bonus con item small_bin ❌ +25% chance, +40% quantity con trash_gloves dumpster trash_gloves +40% chance, +60% quantity con trash_gloves mailbox crowbar +60% chance con crowbar

docs.title: Mapping Prop → Categoria
docs.text:
Assegna ogni modello 3D a una categoria tramite la tabella CONFIG.TRASH_PROPS.

CONFIG.TRASH_PROPS = {
    -- Small Bin
    ["prop_bin_01a"] = "small_bin",
    ["prop_bin_02a"] = "small_bin",
    -- Dumpster
    ["prop_dumpster_01a"] = "dumpster",
    ["prop_dumpster_02a"] = "dumpster",
    -- Mailbox
    ["prop_mailbox_01a"] = "mailbox",
}

Aggiungere nuovi prop

Aggiungi il nome del modello come chiave e la categoria come valore.

docs.title: Loot per Categoria
docs.text:
CONFIG.TRASH_LOOT = {
    small_bin = {
        { item = "weed",      chance = 50,  amount = {1, 20} },
        { item = "griffon_2", chance = 100, amount = {0, 1}  }
    },
    dumpster = {
        { item = "scrap",       chance = 70, amount = {2, 6} },
        { item = "electronics", chance = 20, amount = {1, 2} }
    },
    mailbox = {
        { item = "letter",      chance = 80, amount = {1, 2}   },
        { item = "money_dirty", chance = 15, amount = {20, 60} }
    }
}
Campo Tipo Descrizione item string Nome item nell'inventario chance number Probabilità (1–100) amount {min, max} Quantità randomica

docs.title: Override per Posizione Specifica
docs.text:
Puoi assegnare un loot diverso a un contenitore specifico tramite coordinate.

CONFIG.TRASH_OVERRIDE_POS = {
    {
        model  = "prop_bin_01a",
        coords = vec3(150.24, -1040.32, 29.37),
        radius = 1.0,
        loot   = {
            { item = "money_dirty", chance = 20, amount = {50, 150} },
            { item = "wallet",      chance = 40, amount = {1, 1}    }
        }
    },
    {
        model  = "prop_dumpster_4a",
        coords = vec3(992.15, -3105.42, 5.90),
        radius = 1.5,
        loot   = {
            { item = "weapon_parts", chance = 15, amount = {1, 2} },
            { item = "scrap",        chance = 80, amount = {2, 6} }
        }
    }
}

Come funziona l'override

Se il contenitore target è entro radius dalle coordinate specificate e corrisponde al model, viene usato il loot dell'override invece del loot standard della categoria.

docs.title: Export Disponibili
docs.text:
Nessun export registrato

avalon_trash non espone export pubblici.

docs.title: Funzionamento
docs.text:
[Giocatore vicino a un contenitore] → ox_target "Cerca nel cestino"
    ↓
Controllo item richiesti → Animazione → Progress bar (SEARCH_TIME ms)
    ↓
Server: calcola loot (override POS > categoria standard)
        Applica moltiplicatori bonus (item in inventario)
    ↓
Stash temporaneo generato → ox_inventory apre lo stash
    ↓
Cooldown attivato → Refresh globale ogni TRASH_REFRESH_TIME secondi

docs.title: AvalonStudios เอกสารสคริปต์
docs.text:
ยินดีต้อนรับสู่เอกสารอย่างเป็นทางการของสคริปต์ FiveM จาก AvalonStudios

ที่นี่คุณจะพบคู่มืออ้างอิงครบถ้วนสำหรับสคริปต์ทั้งหมด: การตั้งค่า, ฟังก์ชัน export ที่ใช้งานได้ และตัวอย่างการใช้งาน

docs.title: สคริปต์ที่มีให้ใช้
docs.text: สคริปต์ คำอธิบาย Export avalon_coltivation ระบบปลูกพืช ✅ avalon_dustman งานเก็บขยะ (เดี่ยว/กลุ่ม) ❌ avalon_electrician งานช่างไฟฟ้า (มีมินิเกม) ❌ avalon_lumberjack งานตัดไม้ (มีมินิเกม) ❌ avalon_mining งานขุดแร่ (มีมินิเกม) ❌ avalon_mounts สัตว์ขี่ (มังกร กริฟฟิน เพกาซัส...) ✅ avalon_party ระบบปาร์ตี้ MMORPG (HUD, แถบพลังชีวิต, ดันเจี้ยน) ✅ avalon_robbery ระบบปล้นร้านค้า ❌ avalon_trash ระบบค้นหาในขยะ ❌

docs.title: ไลบรารีที่จำเป็น
docs.text:
สคริปต์ทั้งหมดต้องการ resource เหล่านี้ที่ทำงานอยู่:

  • ox_lib — ไลบรารีพื้นฐาน
  • ox_target — ระบบปฏิสัมพันธ์
  • ox_inventory — ระบบกระเป๋า
  • es_extended — ESX Framework

คำแนะนำ

ตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่า dependency ทั้งหมดเริ่มทำงาน ก่อน สคริปต์ Avalon ใน server.cfg

docs.title: วิธีใช้ Export
docs.text:
Export ช่วยให้สคริปต์อื่นเรียกใช้ฟังก์ชันจากสคริปต์ Avalon โดยไม่ต้องพึ่งพาโค้ดโดยตรง

Client (ฝั่งลูกค้า)Server (ฝั่งเซิร์ฟเวอร์) 
exports['ชื่อ-resource']:ชื่อฟังก์ชัน(พารามิเตอร์1, พารามิเตอร์2)

exports['ชื่อ-resource']:ชื่อฟังก์ชัน(พารามิเตอร์1, พารามิเตอร์2)

สำคัญ

Export ของ client เรียกได้จากสคริปต์ฝั่งลูกค้าเท่านั้น Export ของ server เรียกได้จากสคริปต์ฝั่งเซิร์ฟเวอร์เท่านั้น

เอกสารโดย AvalonStudios — GitHub

docs.title: avalon_coltivation
docs.text:
สคริปต์ปลูกพืชใน FiveM ช่วยให้ผู้เล่นสามารถปลูก รดน้ำ ใส่ปุ๋ย และเก็บเกี่ยวพืชได้บนพื้นที่ที่รองรับ

เวอร์ชัน: 1.0 | ผู้พัฒนา: Mino | ฐานข้อมูล: ✅ MySQL

docs.title: ความต้องการ
docs.text: Resource จำเป็น ox_lib ✅ oxmysql ✅ ox_target ✅ ox_inventory ✅

docs.title: การติดตั้ง
docs.text: ensure avalon_coltivation

docs.title: การตั้งค่า
ตัวเลือกทั่วไป
docs.text: ตัวเลือก ประเภท ค่าเริ่มต้น คำอธิบาย CONFIG.MIN_PLANT_DISTANCE number 1.5 ระยะห่างขั้นต่ำระหว่างพืชสองต้น CONFIG.MIN_STAGE_TIME number 300000 เวลาขั้นต่ำ (ms) สำหรับการเติบโตแต่ละขั้น CONFIG.StressMax number 1000000 ค่าความเครียดสูงสุดในการปลูก CONFIG.StressValue number 100 ค่าความเครียดที่เพิ่มทุกครั้งที่ปลูก

docs.title: รายการพืช
docs.text: พืช เมล็ด เวลาเติบโต ผลผลิต ต้องการน้ำ grain (ข้าวสาลี) seme_grano 30 นาที 5x grano ✅ canapa (กัญชง) seme_canapa 45 นาที 3x canapa ✅ coca (โคคา) seme_coca 60 นาที 2x coca ✅ fungus (เห็ด) seme_fungo 20 นาที 4x funghi ❌ papavero (ฝิ่น) seme_papavero 50 นาที 2x papavero ✅

docs.title: เครื่องมือ
docs.text: เครื่องมือ ไอเทม ตัวคูณเวลา ใช้ครั้งเดียว ขั้นที่ใช้ได้ บัวรดน้ำ watering_can -25% ❌ seed, small ปุ๋ย fertilizer -40% ✅ small, grown โคมปลูก grow_lamp -15% ✅ seed, small, grown

docs.title: Export ที่ใช้งานได้
docs.text:
ประเภท: Client-Side

Export เหล่านี้ลงทะเบียนในฝั่ง client ต้องเรียกใช้จากสคริปต์ client เท่านั้น

docs.title: seme_grano
docs.text:
เริ่มวางเมล็ดข้าวสาลี 

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_grano()

docs.title: seme_canapa
docs.text:
เริ่มวางเมล็ดกัญชง 

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_canapa()

docs.title: seme_coca
docs.text:
เริ่มวางเมล็ดโคคา 

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_coca()

docs.title: seme_fungo
docs.text:
เริ่มวางเมล็ดเห็ด 

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_fungo()

docs.title: seme_papavero
docs.text:
เริ่มวางเมล็ดฝิ่น 

exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_papavero()

docs.title: ตัวอย่างการใช้งาน
docs.text:
-- client/main.lua ในสคริปต์ของคุณ
RegisterCommand('ปลูกข้าวสาลี', function()
    exports['avalon_coltivation']:seme_grano()
end)

docs.title: avalon_dustman
docs.text:
สคริปต์งานเก็บขยะใน FiveM รองรับโหมดเดี่ยว (รถตู้เล็ก) และโหมดกลุ่ม (รถขยะ)

เวอร์ชัน: 1.0 | ผู้พัฒนา: Mino

docs.title: การตั้งค่า
docs.text: ตัวเลือก ค่าเริ่มต้น คำอธิบาย Config.Debug true เปิดใช้ log การดีบัก Config.PartyMembers 4 จำนวนสมาชิกกลุ่มสูงสุด Config.BagsPerSector 10 จำนวนถุงที่ต้องเก็บเพื่อเสร็จโซน Config.StressMax 10000 ค่าความเครียดสูงสุด Config.StressValue 100 ความเครียดที่เพิ่มต่อการเก็บถังขยะ 1 ใบ

docs.title: avalon_electrician
docs.text:
สคริปต์งานช่างไฟฟ้าใน FiveM ผู้เล่นซ่อมกล่องไฟฟ้าด้วยมินิเกมที่มี 3 ระดับความยาก

เวอร์ชัน: 1.0 | ผู้พัฒนา: Mino

docs.title: ระดับความยาก
docs.text: ระดับ ชื่อ จุดงาน รายได้ ค่าปรับ 1 ง่าย 33 100–150 ตั๋ว 10 ตั๋ว 2 ปานกลาง 25 200–300 ตั๋ว 25 ตั๋ว 3 ยาก 15 400–600 ตั๋ว 50 ตั๋ว

docs.title: avalon_lumberjack

Lang = "ไทย"

    ["tool_consaw"]= { propModel = "prop_tool_consaw",  BonusLoot = 3, BonusScore = 2 },

Config.durabilitySystemEnabled = true
Config.MaxDurability            = 200
Config.Durability               = 15  -- ความทนทานที่ลดต่อการโค่น

    { name = "raw_material_wood", label = "ไม้",    chance = 20, scoreGame = {min=1, max=5} },
    { name = "rubber",            label = "ยาง",    chance = 5,  scoreGame = {min=1, max=5} },
    { name = "fibers",            label = "เส้นใย", chance = 8,  scoreGame = {min=1, max=5} },

docs.title: avalon_mounts
docs.text:
สคริปต์สัตว์ขี่ใน FiveM ผู้เล่นสามารถเรียก ขี่ และจัดการสิ่งมีชีวิตแฟนตาซี (มังกร กริฟฟิน เพกาซัส ม้า อัลปาก้า) ผ่านคำสั่งหรือไอเทม

เวอร์ชัน: 1.0 | ผู้พัฒนา: Mino

docs.title: ความต้องการ
docs.text: Resource จำเป็น หมายเหตุ ox_lib ✅ การแจ้งเตือนและเครื่องมือ ox_inventory ❌ เฉพาะเมื่อ CONFIG.items = true ox_fuel ❌ รักษาเชื้อเพลิงอัตโนมัติ qbx_core ❌ การรวม QBox key

docs.title: การตั้งค่า
ตัวเลือกทั่วไป
docs.text: ตัวเลือก ประเภท ค่าเริ่มต้น คำอธิบาย CONFIG.command boolean true เปิดใช้คำสั่งเรียกสัตว์ CONFIG.commandName string "mount" ชื่อคำสั่งเรียก (/mount) CONFIG.delCommand string "delMount" ชื่อคำสั่งไล่ออก (/delMount) CONFIG.items boolean true ใช้ไอเทมจากกระเป๋าเพื่อเรียก CONFIG.invincible boolean false ทำให้สัตว์ไม่แพ้ตาย CONFIG.maxrangedespawn number 200.0 ระยะทางก่อน auto-despawn CONFIG.timeForSpawnAfterDeaths number 10000 เวลารอ (ms) หลังเสียชีวิต

docs.title: ปุ่มคีย์
docs.text: ตัวเลือก ปุ่ม คำอธิบาย CONFIG.keyMount 51 (E) ขึ้น / ลงจากสัตว์ CONFIG.keyDelete 74 (H) ไล่สัตว์ออก CONFIG.keyFlymode 73 (X) เปิด/ปิดโหมดบิน

docs.title: ระบบการบิน
docs.text:
CONFIG.flyWithTime = false   -- false = บินได้ไม่จำกัด
CONFIG.flyTimeMax  = 60000   -- เวลาบิน (ms)
CONFIG.flyCooldown = 60000   -- เวลาฟื้นตัว (ms)

docs.title: สัตว์ที่มีให้
docs.text: สัตว์ จำนวนรูปแบบ บินได้ necrodragon (มังกรมืด) 5 ✅ griffon (กริฟฟิน) 3 ✅ pegaso (เพกาซัส) 3 ✅ horse (ม้า) 3 ❌ alpaca (อัลปาก้า) 3 ❌

docs.title: Export ที่ใช้งานได้
API — Client-Side
docs.text:
local MountsAPI = exports['avalon_mounts']:API()

-- เรียก necrodragon (รูปแบบที่ 1)
MountsAPI.spawn("necrodragon", 1)

-- ตรวจสอบว่ามีสัตว์ที่เรียกอยู่
if MountsAPI.isSpawned() then
    print("ผู้เล่นมีสัตว์ขี่ที่ใช้งานอยู่")
end

-- ไล่สัตว์ออก
MountsAPI.despawn()

docs.title: ฟังก์ชัน API
docs.text: ฟังก์ชัน คำอธิบาย spawn(name, color) เรียกสัตว์ despawn() ไล่สัตว์ที่ใช้งานออก isSpawned() มีสัตว์ที่เรียกอยู่หรือไม่? isOnMount() ผู้เล่นกำลังขี่อยู่หรือไม่? getVehicle() ได้รับ entity ของสัตว์ขี่ getData(model) ข้อมูลสัตว์เฉพาะตัว syncInvisible(ent, bool) ซิงค์การมองเห็นทุก client

docs.title: Dynamic Item Exports
docs.text:
exports['avalon_mounts']:necrodragon_1()
exports['avalon_mounts']:griffon_1()
exports['avalon_mounts']:pegaso_1()
exports['avalon_mounts']:horse_1()
exports['avalon_mounts']:alpaca_1()

docs.title: avalon_party
docs.text:
ระบบปาร์ตี้แบบ MMORPGใน FiveM สร้างกลุ่มพร้อม HUD แบบเรียลไทม์ แถบพลังชีวิตที่ปรับแต่งได้ ระบบ ready check, waypoint ร่วม, โหมดสเปคเตเตอร์อัตโนมัติ และระบบมาร์กเป้าหมาย

เวอร์ชัน: 1.0.0 | ผู้พัฒนา: Avalon | Framework: ESX / QBCore / QBox / Standalone

docs.title: ความต้องการ
docs.text: Resource จำเป็น ox_lib ✅ ox_target ✅

docs.title: คำสั่ง
docs.text: คำสั่ง พารามิเตอร์ คำอธิบาย /partyinvite [id ผู้เล่น] เชิญผู้เล่นเข้าปาร์ตี้ /partyaccept — ยอมรับคำเชิญ /partydecline — ปฏิเสธคำเชิญ /partyleave — ออกจากปาร์ตี้ /partydisband — ยุบปาร์ตี้ (หัวหน้า) /partykick [id ผู้เล่น] ไล่สมาชิกออก (หัวหน้า) /partytransfer [id ผู้เล่น] โอนตำแหน่งหัวหน้า (หัวหน้า) /partyready — เริ่ม ready check (หัวหน้า) /partywp — แชร์ waypoint (หัวหน้า)

docs.title: Export ที่ใช้งานได้
ฝั่งเซิร์ฟเวอร์
IsInParty(source) → boolean
docs.text:
if exports['avalon_party']:IsInParty(source) then
    -- ผู้เล่นอยู่ในปาร์ตี้
end

docs.title: GetPartyMembers(source) → table | nil
docs.text:
local members = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyMembers(source)
if members then
    for _, id in ipairs(members) do
        exports.ox_inventory:AddItem(id, 'health_potion', 1)
    end
end

docs.title: GetPartyLeader(source) → number | nil
docs.text: local leader = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyLeader(source)

docs.title: SetMemberBar(source, barId, value, maxValue) → boolean
docs.text:
อัปเดตแถบ custom ใน HUD ที่มองเห็นได้โดยสมาชิกทุกคน

-- อัปเดตแถบมานาหลังร่ายคาถา
RegisterNetEvent('magic:cast', function(cost)
    local newMana = math.max(0, GetMana(source) - cost)
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberBar(source, 'mana', newMana, 100)
end)

docs.title: SetMemberStatus(source, statusId, active) → boolean
docs.text:
แสดง/ซ่อนไอคอนสถานะบน member card

exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', true)   -- แสดง "ถูกวางยา"
exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'poisoned', false)  -- ซ่อน

exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'combat', true)
SetTimeout(5000, function()
    exports['avalon_party']:SetMemberStatus(source, 'combat', false)
end)

docs.title: SetPartyBucket(source, bucket) → boolean
docs.text:
ย้ายทั้งปาร์ตี้ไปยัง routing bucket (อินสแตนซ์ส่วนตัว)

RegisterNetEvent('dungeon:enter', function(id)
    local ok = exports['avalon_party']:SetPartyBucket(source, 1000 + id)
    if not ok then
        TriggerClientEvent('ox_lib:notify', source, { type='error', description='ต้องมีปาร์ตี้เพื่อเข้าดันเจี้ยน!' })
    end
end)

RegisterNetEvent('dungeon:exit', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:SetPartyBucket(source, 0)
end)

docs.title: GetPartyBucket(source) → number
docs.text: local bucket = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyBucket(source)

docs.title: ฝั่งไคลเอนต์
RequestMemberPick(mode, callbackEvent)
docs.text:
เปิดโหมดเลือกสมาชิก callback รับ { source, name }

RegisterCommand('heal_ally', function()
    exports['avalon_party']:RequestMemberPick('self', 'heal:target')
end)

RegisterNetEvent('heal:target', function(member)
    if not member then return end
    TriggerServerEvent('heal:apply', member.source, 50)
end)

docs.title: CancelMemberPick()
docs.text: exports['avalon_party']:CancelMemberPick()

docs.title: GetPartyTarget() → { ped, netId, source, isPlayer } | nil
docs.text:
local target = exports['avalon_party']:GetPartyTarget()
if target and target.isPlayer then
    TriggerServerEvent('combat:attack', target.source)
end

docs.title: avalon_robbery
docs.text:
สคริปต์ปล้นร้านค้าใน FiveM ผู้เล่นเล็งอาวุธไปที่แคชเชียร์ NPC เพื่อเริ่มปล้น เก็บเงินทีละน้อย และเปิดตู้นิรภัยด้วยมินิเกม

เวอร์ชัน: 1.0 | ผู้พัฒนา: Mino

docs.title: การตั้งค่า
docs.text:
CONFIG.SHOPS = {
    ["shop00"] = {
        ped         = { model = "s_m_m_ammucountry", coords = vector4(-1221.71, -908.18, 12.326, 0.0) },
        lockbox     = { coords = vector4(-1221.310, -915.907, 11.096, 123.85), weight = 50000 },
        items       = { {name = "money", quantity = 1000} },
        policeNotify= "พบกิจกรรมน่าสงสัยในร้าน!",
        jobToNotify = "police",
        tools       = "stetoscopio",
        minigame    = { game = "Locked", options = nil },
        timeForRobbery  = 30000,   -- 30 วินาที
        startMoney      = 500,
        startMoneyStep  = 50,
        startMoneyDelay = 1000,
        shopResetTime   = 1800000  -- 30 นาที
    }
}
คีย์ คำอธิบาย timeForRobbery ระยะเวลาปล้น (ms) startMoney เงินทั้งหมดในเครื่องเก็บเงิน startMoneyStep เงินที่ได้ต่อขั้นตอนแอนิเมชัน shopResetTime ms ก่อนที่ร้านจะรีเซ็ต

docs.title: avalon_trash
docs.text:
สคริปต์ค้นหาในขยะใน FiveM ผู้เล่นสามารถค้นหาในถังขยะ ถังขยะขนาดใหญ่ และตู้จดหมายเพื่อหาของสุ่ม

เวอร์ชัน: 1.0 | ผู้พัฒนา: Mino

docs.title: การตั้งค่า
docs.text:
CONFIG.SEARCH_TIME        = 5000    -- เวลาแถบความคืบหน้า (ms)
CONFIG.COOLDOWN           = 60      -- วินาทีก่อนค้นหาถังเดิมได้อีก
CONFIG.TRASH_REFRESH_TIME = 5 * 60  -- วินาทีก่อนของรางวัลจะสร้างใหม่

docs.title: หมวดหมู่ถัง
docs.text: หมวดหมู่ ไอเทมที่ต้องการ โบนัส small_bin (ถังขยะเล็ก) ❌ +25% โอกาสเมื่อมี trash_gloves dumpster (ถังขยะใหญ่) trash_gloves +40% โอกาส mailbox (ตู้จดหมาย) crowbar +60% โอกาส

docs.title: ของรางวัล
docs.text:
CONFIG.TRASH_LOOT = {
    small_bin = { { item = "weed",  chance = 50, amount = {1,20} } },
